Quality Education.reason: Focus on '提升教育品質' and '教育領導發展' aligns with Targets 4.1 and 4.7.
The course is fundamentally about improving educational quality through leadership and management, directly aligning with Targets 4.2 and 4.c by focusing on '優質教育' (quality education).
